loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live power (kVA) and active/reactive power (kW/kVAr) from panel members; rated capacity (kVA) and load factor are not measured for this asset, so capacityValue and Load Factor are blank.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate demand profile from member meters (UPS, BPDB, HHF); specific KPIs and thresholds are rendered by the panel-aggregate member fan-out.
